channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Abuja realtor faces arrest over land fraud allegations
item.description: A federal court in Abuja ordered the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) to arrest realtor Rebecca Godwin-Isaac for skipping a hearing in her land fraud trial. The judge issued the order a...

item.title: EFCC Arrests Abuja Realtor Over ₦500 Million Land Fraud Allegations
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has arrested Rebecca Omokamo Godwin-Isaac, an Abuja-based realtor, after a Federal High Court ordered her custody for her trial over alleged land fr...

item.title: Saudi Oil Tankers Change Route as Houthi Threats Deepen Regional Conflict and Disrupt Key Shipping Lanes
item.description: Two oil tankers carrying Saudi crude to China and India reversed course in the Red Sea after Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthi movement threatened to attack vessels involved in transporting Saudi oil. The m...

item.title: US introduces bill to criminalize foreign repression targeting activists
item.description: A bipartisan group of US senators has introduced the Stop Transnational Repression Act of 2026, aiming to criminalize foreign governments' efforts to intimidate political opponents and activists in th...

item.title: Lionel Messi Reflects on Heartbreaking World Cup Final Defeat to Spain
item.description: Lionel Messi has shared his emotional reaction to Argentina's 1-0 extra-time loss to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, marking the end of a historic campaign. The 39-year-old legend posted a hea...

item.title: Women’s World Cup 2027: Brazil Hosts as Spain and USA Prepare for Clash
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming Women’s World Cup in Brazil, set for next summer, and highlights key teams and preparations. Spain, currently the top-ranked women’s team, won the 2023 tournament, w...

item.title: Ondo Assembly to Address Speaker and Deputy Over Alleged N44Million Fund Mismanagement
item.description: The Ondo State House of Assembly is set to decide the fate of Speaker Olamide Oladiji and Deputy Speaker Ololade Gbegudu after they failed to resign over allegations of misusing ₦44 million from the O...

item.title: Senate Expresses Concern Over Misuse of Flood Rehabilitation Funds in KP
item.description: A Senate panel has raised serious concerns about the misallocation of flood rehabilitation funds in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP), accusing authorities of diverting resources to less-affected areas for poli...

item.title: British man stranded in Dubai appeals for help after illness, debt and visa issues leave him unable to return to the UK
item.description: Simon Ferguson, a 64-year-old British aviation consultant originally from Mancot in North Wales, says he is trapped in Dubai after a combination of serious health problems, financial difficulties and ...

item.title: Deaf actor Kaylee Hottle, known for Godzilla vs. Kong, dies in Maryland car crash
item.description: Kaylee Hottle, a Deaf actress who played Jia in the films 'Godzilla vs. Kong' and its sequel, has died at the age of 18 following a severe car accident in Maryland. Her father, Joshua Hottle, confirme...

item.title: Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett Faces Backlash for Criticizing Smithsonian's Historical Accounts
item.description: U.S. Representative Jasmine Crockett (D-TX) faced criticism from conservative peers after describing a House Oversight Committee hearing on the Smithsonian as 'the Republicans' White Pride rally disgu...

item.title: Technical access issues reported for Shepparton weather page
item.description: The article discusses technical access issues encountered by users attempting to view the Shepparton weather page. News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic, which may...

item.title: Empire Company to revise property controls, easing competition in grocery sector
item.description: Empire Company Limited, the parent firm of Sobeys, has announced plans to revise its use of property controls, a practice that has long restricted competitors from establishing stores in specific loca...

item.title: Government introduces 50% quota for ex-Agniveers in CAPF and Assam Rifles roles
item.description: The Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) has announced a significant policy change allowing 50% reservation for ex-Agniveers in constable (general duty) and rifleman posts across Central Armed Police Forces...

item.title: Dr Kirthi Ramdhani becomes the first African surgeon qualified in both paediatric and plastic surgery
item.description: Dr Kirthi Ramdhani, a specialist based at Tygerberg Hospital and Stellenbosch University, has become the first African surgeon to qualify in both paediatric surgery and plastic, reconstructive and aes...

item.title: Kauyam: Word of the Day for July 22, 2026
item.description: The article announces 'kauyam' as the Word of the Day for July 22, 2026, under the ABS-CBN Lifestyle section. It highlights the importance of vocabulary expansion and cultural awareness, emphasizing h...

item.title: U.S. Measles Cases Reach 35-Year High in 2026
item.description: As of July 21, 2026, the United States reported 2,295 measles cases, surpassing last year's total of 2,289 and marking the highest level in 35 years. Data from Johns Hopkins University's U.S. measles ...

item.title: Jersey Mike's Overtakes Chick-fil-A in Customer Satisfaction Rankings, But Chick-fil-A's Scores Remain Stable
item.description: The American Customer Satisfaction Index (ACSI) report reveals Jersey Mike's has surpassed Chick-fil-A as the top-rated quick-service restaurant, ending Chick-fil-A's 11-year reign. While Chick-fil-A'...

item.title: Bolo Bespoke Faces Scrutiny Over Liquor Receipt Errors
item.description: Fashion designer Bolo Bespoke is under fire after sharing a club receipt to celebrate a KSh 4 million World Cup bet win, which contained conflicting dates and arithmetic errors. The receipt listed pur...

item.title: Residents and Advocates Urge Government to Halt Altai's Mining Plans on Sibuyan Island
item.description: The article highlights growing opposition from residents and environmental advocates against the planned mining activities of Altai Philippines Mining Corporation (APMC) on Sibuyan Island. Local leade...
